subcodes.first_line: O thou who art gladdened by the fragrances of God! I have perused thy luminous letter and was delighted by its contents [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایتها المستبشره بنفحات الله انی تلوت نمیقتک الغراء و ابتهجت بمضامینها
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @work as worship, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @love and unity
